title: `kube play` ignores `restartPolicy`
body:
### Issue Description

`podman kube play` ignores the `restartPolicy` field.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Create test.yml
```
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: test
  restartPolicy: Never
spec:
  containers:
  - name: test
    image: docker.io/alpine
    command: ["echo", "hi"]
```

2. `podman kube play --replace test.yml`


### Describe the results you received

```
[~] podman pod logs test
ac6d637dda7a hi
ac6d637dda7a hi
ac6d637dda7a hi
ac6d637dda7a hi
ac6d637dda7a hi
...

[~] podman inspect test-test | jq '.[].HostConfig.RestartPolicy'
{
  "Name": "always",
  "MaximumRetryCount": 0
}

[~] podman inspect test | jq '.[].RestartPolicy'
"always"
```

### Describe the results you expected

```
[~] podman pod logs test
ac6d637dda7a hi

[~] podman inspect test-test | jq '.[].HostConfig.RestartPolicy'
{
  "Name": "no",
  "MaximumRetryCount": 0
}

[~] podman inspect test | jq '.[].RestartPolicy'
"no"
```
